mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, brand, price, images, status, category_id FROM machinery
status != 2 AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, name, owner_id, category_id, brand, price, images, status FROM (SELECT id, name, brand, owner_id, category_id, price, images, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY category_id ORDER BY RAND()) as rn FROM machinery WHERE status != 2 -- 排除维护中 ) tmp WHERE rn = 1

SELECT id, name, brand, price, images, status FROM machinery WHERE status != 2 AND category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE machinery SET stock = stock - 1, locked_stock = locked_stock + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND stock > 0
UPDATE machinery SET stock = stock + 1, locked_stock = locked_stock - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND locked_stock > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO machinery (owner_id, category_id, name, brand, model, description, price, deposit, images, status, stock, locked_stock, avg_rating, parameters, create_time) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{brand}, #{model}, #{description}, #{price}, #{deposit}, #{images}, #{status}, #{stock}, #{lockedStock}, #{avgRating}, #{parameters}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, create_time FROM categories ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, name, brand, model, category_id AS categoryId, price, deposit, description, images, status, stock, locked_stock AS lockedStock, avg_rating AS avgRating, create_time AS createTime FROM machinery WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
